title: Onboarding - Translations
scenario: Onboarding flow displays properly translated text for all supported languages in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. If already logged in, log out or clear app data to trigger the Onboarding flow.
3. Observe the Onboarding screens (Welcome, Permissions, Device Setup, etc.).
4. Change the device system language to each supported language (e.g., English, French, German, Spanish, Japanese, Korean, Simplified Chinese, etc.).
5. Re-launch the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate through the full Onboarding flow.

6. For each language, verify that all text elements (titles, descriptions, buttons, error messages, tooltips) are properly translated and displayed without truncation, placeholder text, or untranslated English strings.
expected: All Onboarding screens display properly translated text for each supported language, with no truncation, missing translations, or layout issues.
